text:
Acme Corporation - Consolidated Financial Summary (all figures in USD millions).

Revenue by reportable segment:
Segment: Cloud. FY2023: 300. FY2022: 240.
Segment: Services. FY2023: 150. FY2022: 130.
Segment: Hardware. FY2023: 50. FY2022: 50.
Total revenue. FY2023: 500. FY2022: 420.

Acme reports revenue across three reportable segments: Cloud, Services, and Hardware. Total revenue grew from 420 in FY2022 to 500 in FY2023, an increase of 80 (about a 19% rise). Operating income was 90 in FY2023 and 70 in FY2022.

Acme Corporation Annual Report (Form 10-K), fiscal year ended December 31, 2023.

Item 1. Business. Acme Corporation is a technology company that designs and sells cloud software, professional services, and networking hardware to enterprise customers worldwide. The company was incorporated in Delaware in 2004 and is headquartered in Austin, Texas. As of December 31, 2023, Acme employed 4,200 full-time employees. The company's Chief Executive Officer is Jane Smith, who has served in the role since 2016.

Item 1A. Risk Factors. Acme's business is subject to intense competition, dependence on a small number of large customers, and risks associated with international operations and foreign currency fluctuations. A significant portion of revenue is concentrated in the Cloud segment, and a decline in cloud demand could materially affect results.

Acme's fiscal year ends on December 31. The company files its annual report on Form 10-K.

Acme Product Guide.

The Acme CloudBox appliance ships with a standard limited warranty of 24 months from the date of purchase. Extended warranty coverage of up to 60 months is available for purchase.

Technical support is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week for customers on the Premium support plan. Standard support customers receive coverage during business hours only.

The CloudBox appliance supports up to 128 concurrent connections and requires firmware version 3.2 or later.
